sentences.arabic: دَرَسَ طَارِقٌ اللُّغَةَ الإِنْجِلِيزِيَّةَ مَعَ مُعَلِّمٍ جَدِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Tariq je učio engleski jezik s novim nastavnikom.
sentences.translationEn: Tariq studied English with a new teacher.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ كَيْفَ يَقُولُ كَلِمَاتٍ بَسِيطَةً بِالإِنْجِلِيزِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Naučio je kako izgovoriti jednostavne riječi na engleskom.
sentences.translationEn: He learned how to say simple words in English.

sentences.arabic: كَرَّرَ الكَلِمَاتِ بَعْدَ المُعَلِّمِ مَرَّاتٍ عَدِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Ponavljao je riječi za nastavnikom više puta.
sentences.translationEn: He repeated the words after the teacher many times.

sentences.arabic: فِي نِهَايَةِ الدَّرْسِ حَفِظَ عَشْرَ كَلِمَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju časa zapamtio je deset novih riječi.
sentences.translationEn: At the end of the class he memorized ten new words.
